title: Bone Tools
description: Add New tools in Minecraft Java !
body:
Tired of the usual wood and stone tier? This mod expands your gameplay by adding a brand-new range of equipment crafted from the remains of your enemies.

![All bone tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SCAJSsrT/images/ccd14995843c48c7816003a26d7a5806ae483285_350.webp)

Key Features:

   - Full Toolset: Bone pickaxe, shovel, axe, and hoe.

   - Combat Arsenal: The classic bone sword, and the newly added Bone Dagger, featuring faster attack speeds for quick strikes!

   - Balancing: Stats positioned between wood and stone, offering a unique durability profile.

   - Immersion: Perfect for "RAG" modpacks or a more primitive survival experience.
